tagline: Family-owned heating & air conditioning, trusted across Sonoma and Marin since 1988.
seoDescription: North HVAC Services is a family-owned heating, cooling, and air quality company serving Petaluma and Sonoma & Marin Counties. Mitsubishi Diamond and Trane dealer, CSLB #1054297. Call (707) 430-3360.
heroHeading: Comfort you can count on, all year round
heroSubheading: North HVAC Services is a family-owned heating and air conditioning company keeping Petaluma, Sonoma, and Marin homes comfortable since 1988.
highlights: Mitsubishi Diamond Authorized Dealer & Trane Factory Dealer
A+ rated with the Better Business Bureau
Serving Sonoma & Marin Counties from Petaluma
aboutBody: North HVAC Services is a family-owned, full-service heating and air conditioning business dedicated to keeping homes throughout Sonoma and Marin Counties comfortable and safe year round. Established in 1988, the company's owners bring more than 48 years of combined experience in the trade, and our friends and neighbors have trusted us to care for their homes for decades.

We're a true family operation. Chris, a well-rounded journeyman who leads the company, partnered with the original owner in 2019 and brought on his brother Paul as a skilled service technician, along with installation manager Ivan. From the owners to our installers, technicians, and office staff, we're committed to quality craftsmanship and honest customer service at fair prices.

services.title: Heating Installation & Repair
services.description: Gas furnace repair, maintenance, and high-efficiency replacements to keep your home warm through the coldest North Bay nights.

services.title: Air Conditioning
services.description: AC repair, tune-ups, and new system installations sized right for your home so you stay cool and energy-efficient all summer.

services.title: Heat Pumps & Mini-Splits
services.description: As a Mitsubishi Diamond Authorized Dealer, we install and service ductless mini-split and heat pump systems for efficient, all-electric comfort.

services.title: HVAC Maintenance & Tune-Ups
services.description: Routine maintenance and seasonal tune-ups that extend equipment life, protect efficiency, and head off breakdowns before they start.

services.title: Indoor Air Quality
services.description: Air quality solutions and ductwork that help your family breathe cleaner, healthier air at home.

services.title: Commercial HVAC
services.description: Service, repair, and installation for commercial spaces across Sonoma and Marin Counties.

testimonials.quote: It's always a pleasure to work with Chris & Paul. Definitely recommend.
testimonials.author: Verified review · Petaluma

testimonials.quote: Great communication to start! Paul arrived on time and did a great job.
testimonials.author: Verified review · Petaluma

testimonials.quote: The entire project was so pleasant we would give it 10 stars if possible!
testimonials.author: Verified review · Petaluma

notes: Verified from northhvacservices.com (home + /about/), BBB profile, and web search. Established 1988; owners have 48+ years combined experience; Chris partnered with the original owner in 2019 (BBB lists current entity started 6/4/2019, incorporated 2/5/2020). Family-owned: co-owners Chris (lead journeyman), Paul (brother, service tech), Ivan (install manager); Lila Burke office manager. CSLB #1054297 (expires 1/31/2027). Mitsubishi Diamond Authorized Dealer; Trane & Day & Night authorized factory dealer. A+ BBB (not accredited). Hours Mon–Fri 6am–4pm, after-hours by appt. Serves Marin (Corte Madera, Mill Valley, Novato, San Rafael, Sausalito, etc.) and Sonoma (Petaluma, Cotati, Penngrove, Rohnert Park, Santa Rosa, Sonoma). 5-star / 254 Google reviews. Testimonials are real named reviews from the site (Milton Davis, Suzanne Ord, Glenn Mar) anonymized to 'Verified review · Petaluma'.
